purpose: Own concrete resource lifecycle helpers for the Points renderer without hiding pass-local WebGPU contracts.
invariants: Texture formats, usage flags, and shader binding names stay explicit at call sites.
Buffer reuse remains byte-length based and only recreates missing, destroyed, or resized buffers.
Helpers do not add draw hot-path allocation or virtual dispatch.
change_protocols: Changing buffer or texture helper semantics requires checking every call site in src/modules/Points/index.ts.
Do not add generic cross-module GPU abstractions here.
